Investors are eager for the results and hopeful for surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter, as market reactions are often guided by such outlooks. Investors are advised to stay informed about industry expectations to make informed decisions.

news.headline: Quest Diagnostics beat Q3 earnings estimates with $2.30 EPS, sales rose 8.5% to $2.49B. CEO expects growth with new customers and acquisitions.
news.summary: Quest Diagnostics Inc (NYSE: DGX) announced third-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $2.30, surpassing the expected $2.26 consensus. Sales showed a notable 8.5% year-over-year increase, reaching $2.49 billion, higher than the predicted $2.42 billion. The company's total revenue growth also reached 8.5%, with 4.2% stemming from organic growth as highlighted by Quest Diagnostics CEO Jim Davis. He attributed the strong performance to securing new customers, expanding relationships with physicians and hospitals, and recent acquisitions like LifeLabs. Davis mentioned that the company is currently on track to finalize eight acquisitions meeting their criteria by the end of the year.

news.headline: Brooklyn Brewery launches "Calling All Makers" grant program to support creative innovators across five disciplines in Brooklyn.
news.summary: A new "Calling All Makers" grant program has been launched by Brooklyn Brewery in Brooklyn, N.Y. This initiative aims to champion creativity in various fields by offering support and recognition. Brooklyn Brewery, well-known for its role in the craft beer industry, is committed to nurturing innovation within its community. The program seeks to empower individuals who show promise in making a positive impact. This initiative reflects the brewery's dedication to fostering creativity, with the goal of supporting and celebrating makers across different disciplines.

news.headline: Raise the Rates Coalition demands increased social assistance rates at Queen’s Park for 1 million Ontarians falling below poverty line by $1,569 or $575 per month.
news.summary: In Toronto, there is a glaring disparity between the financial support provided by the government and the actual needs of residents. Approximately one million individuals in Ontario depend on social assistance, with recipients of Ontario Works (OW) falling $1,569 below the poverty line each month, while those on the Ontario Disability Support Program (ODSP) fare slightly better but still lack $575 monthly. This significant gap highlights the challenges faced by vulnerable populations trying to make ends meet amidst rising living costs.

news.headline: HKMA cautions against fake Bank Julius Baer sites targeting clients. Report suspicious activities to secure your funds.
news.summary: A public alert has been issued by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding fake websites and phishing attempts posing as Bank Julius Baer. Individuals are advised to be wary and report any dubious activity.

news.headline: Regina Lee named Global Leader of Risk, Forensics & Compliance business at Ankura Consulting Group with 25 years experience.
news.summary: In a recent update from New York on October 22, 2024, Ankura Consulting Group, LLC, a prominent global expert services and advisory firm, introduced Regina Lee as the new Global Leader of its Risk, Forensics, and Compliance sector. With over 25 years of experience, Regina Lee is set to lead this business segment.

news.headline: Intelligent Audit recognized as top freight audit provider in Logistics Tech Outlook magazine cover feature - Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Intelligent Audit (IA), a prominent company specializing in transportation spend management, was recognized in Logistics Tech Outlook magazine as one of the leading providers of freight audit and payment solutions. The article showcased IA's innovative services and noted its position as a global leader in the industry.

news.headline: Global smart water metering market to reach $7.36 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 9.9% from $3.80 billion in 2023.
news.summary: The global smart water metering market is expected to grow significantly, with a projected market size of US$7.36 billion by 2031, up from US$3.80 billion in 2023. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.9% during the forecast period from 2023 to 2031. The report, released on October 22, 2024, by The Insight Partners highlights the increasing adoption of smart water technologies worldwide.

news.headline: Ascenda introduces new loyalty-as-a-service model, optimizing business outcomes for financial institutions worldwide.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in New York City, Ascenda unveiled its latest loyalty-as-a-service solution, positioning itself as a highly interconnected rewards platform globally. This innovative offering aims to disrupt traditional industry standards and drive enhanced business results for financial institutions.

news.headline: Performio launches Plan Builder for incentive compensation management, offering unmatched flexibility and control.
news.summary: Performio, a top incentive compensation management (ICM) software provider, recently introduced Plan Builder in IRVINE, Calif., on October 22, 2024. According to the company, Plan Builder is recognized as the most user-friendly tool for creating and overseeing incentive compensation plans in the industry. This groundbreaking software is expected to revolutionize the way companies manage their compensation programs, increasing efficiency and accuracy. This announcement signifies a significant development in Performio's offerings, presenting a crucial milestone in their mission to streamline incentive compensation processes. With this innovation, Performio is set to maintain its position as a trailblazer in the ICM sector, solidifying its commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions to its clients.

news.headline: Verdek secures 3-year contract with State of California to supply EV chargers, highlighting commitment to sustainability.
news.summary: In Monroe, Connecticut, on October 22, 2024, Verdek, a prominent supplier of Electric Vehicle Charging Solutions, has officially revealed the successful acquisition of a significant 3-year agreement with the State of California. This pivotal deal highlights Verdek's dedication to promoting sustainable energy solutions and showcases their expertise in the field.

news.headline: FAA drops rule for 'No Smoking' sign off switch on planes post smoking ban; sign to remain on permanently.
news.summary: The Federal Aviation Administration has eliminated a regulation mandating an off switch for the no-smoking sign on U.S. flights, despite smoking being banned on these flights for several years.

news.headline: Activate releases 8th annual State of Demand Gen Report from top performers, providing insights on B2B marketing success in 2025.
news.summary: Activate has recently published their 8th Annual State of Demand Gen Report in San Francisco on October 22, 2024. The report provides valuable insights from top performers in the industry. It delves into the effectiveness of strategies and tactics in B2B demand generation, highlighting the factors that differentiate higher-performing teams from others. This comprehensive report sheds light on the current landscape of demand generation and offers exclusive data to help businesses navigate the evolving market trends.

news.headline: Insurity will host a panel on the Future of P&C Insurance at Excellence in Insurance Conference with top CEOs.
news.summary: Insurity, a top provider of cloud-based software and regulatory bureau-managed services for insurance industry players, has revealed its plan to conduct an executive leadership panel discussion titled "How Insurance CEOs are Steering the Future of P&C in 2025" at the upcoming Excellence in Insurance conference. Taking place from October 28-30 in Amelia Island, Florida, the event will showcase prominent presidents and CEOs from the property and casualty (P&C) insurance sector. This panel is expected to offer valuable insights into the vision and direction of the industry in the future.

news.headline: Dollywood marks its 40th anniversary in 2025, transforming from a small park in 1986 to a global family destination.
news.summary: Located in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, Dollywood, a theme park founded by Dolly Parton in her home county in 1986, has evolved into a prominent family destination. Celebrating its 40th season in 2025, Dollywood Parks & Resorts has transformed significantly since its establishment on May 3, 1986. Despite the changes, the park's core mission persists—to provide a hospitable setting for families to cherish moments together.

news.headline: Survey finds only 34% of AI pros feel fully equipped to meet business goals, despite increased investments. Over 700 participants.
news.summary: In a recent global survey conducted by DataRobot, a leading enterprise AI platform, it was found that organizations are facing challenges in achieving business value through AI. Despite a rise in AI investments, only 34% of AI professionals believe they have the required tools to meet their organization's AI objectives effectively. The survey, which involved over 700 AI practitioners and leaders across various business scales and AI proficiency levels, showcased a growing concern with 50% expressing difficulties in driving AI-powered initiatives to success.

news.headline: ELEGRP launched TrapConnect™ and 3-in-1 GFCI Receptacles at NECA 2024, held from Sep 29 to Oct 1 in San Diego. Leading electrical supplies manufacturer.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in San Diego, ELEGRP, the global leader in electrical supplies, presented its newest advancements at the National Electrical Contractors Association (NECA) Show held from September 29 to October 1, 2024. This event in California featured ELEGRP's latest innovations and products targeting the electrical industry.

news.headline: Berkshire Hathaway Travel Protection's report lists Iceland, Australia, and Canada as top safe travel destinations for 2025.
news.summary: Berkshire Hathaway Travel Protection (BHTP) from Stevens Point, Wisconsin, recently released its tenth annual State of Travel Insurance Safest Destinations report. This research project analyzes U.S. travelers' perspectives on travel safety and insurance. For those planning their 2025 trips, popular destinations like Iceland, Australia, and Canada are recommended due to their high safety rankings. This report is considered one of the most reliable sources for travel safety insights.

news.headline: Keysight and Siemens EDA partner to advance wireless design for 5G generation.
news.summary: A collaboration has been announced between Keysight and Siemens EDA in Santa Rosa, Calif., to facilitate advancements in wireless design for the future. The partnership, focusing on 5G technology, aims to drive innovation and enhance the capabilities of wireless design moving forward. This collaboration is poised to have a significant impact on the industry, promoting further developments in wireless technology.

news.headline: Panasonic introduces High-Res Transducer to boost accuracy and efficiency in assembly systems at Assembly Show 2024.
news.summary: Panasonic has introduced a cutting-edge High-Resolution Transducer to boost precision and effectiveness in their array of assembly tools in ROSEMONT, Ill., with the announcement made on Oct. 22, 2024. As a prominent player in cordless assembly technology, Panasonic is set to showcase a wide range of rapid fastening solutions.

news.headline: SkyShare announced SFX-12 program with PC-12 shares starting 41% lower than previous offering at NBAA-BACE event.
news.summary: SkyShare, a private aviation firm catering to entrepreneurs, has introduced the SFX-12 program, offering PC-12 shares at prices 41% lower than their previous entry option. This new program, launched on October 22, 2024, in Salt Lake City, provides cost-effective full-service solutions for clients.

news.headline: Soccer star Cristiano Ronaldo invests in Bioniq, raising its valuation to $82M, known for personalized nutrition.
news.summary: A company based in London, Bioniq, known for its customized nutritional assistance using blood biomarker information, revealed that Cristiano Ronaldo, a worldwide soccer icon, has made a substantial investment in the firm. Founded in 2019, Bioniq now holds a total valuation of $82 million due to Ronaldo's contribution. Having been a member of Bioniq since 2022 and benefiting from its personalized supplements for close to three years, Ronaldo's investment showcases his dedication to enhancing health and performance.

news.headline: AeroMech ODA issues FAA STC for Starlink high-speed internet on Citation 560XL series aircraft in Everett, Wash.
news.summary: In Everett, Washington, AeroMech ODA has obtained FAA approval for their Supplemental Type Certificate (STC) enabling the installation of Starlink high-speed internet connectivity on Citation 560XL series aircraft. This advancement marks a significant achievement in the aviation industry, allowing these aircraft to benefit from improved connectivity options. The STC approval is expected to enhance the capabilities of Citation 560XL series aircraft, providing passengers with reliable internet access while flying.

news.headline: Kavalan releases limited '15th Anniversary' vintage whisky duo with American ex-Bourbon and Spanish Oloroso Sherry from 2009.
news.summary: Kavalan has introduced its American ex-Bourbon and Spanish Oloroso Sherry from the vintage year 2009. The renowned Taiwanese distiller, Kavalan, based in Taipei, revealed the release of its "15th Anniversary" Limited Edition Whisky Duo, comprising the brand's most aged whiskies up to now.

news.headline: Starlink high-speed internet now available at Textron Aviation service centers for Beechcraft & Cessna aircraft in Las Vegas.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Textron Aviation has introduced Starlink high-speed internet for Beechcraft King Air B200 and B300 series, as well as Cessna Citation 560XL series aircraft. This new technology aims to enhance connectivity for passengers on board, offering faster internet speeds for a better in-flight experience. The service will be available for a total of approximately 550 Beechcraft and Cessna aircraft, providing access to reliable and efficient internet capabilities during flights.

news.headline: ALOHA Collection appoints Lynna Barnard as CEO with 20+ yrs experience in retail and eCommerce growth.
news.summary: In Encinitas, California on October 22, 2024, ALOHA Collection, known as the pioneer in Splash-Proof lifestyle products, revealed Lynna Barnard as its new Chief Executive Officer. With more than two decades of expertise in retail and eCommerce industries, Barnard is set to lead the company towards further growth and success.

news.headline: IP Infusion's OcNOS achieves MEF 3.0 certification for Carrier Ethernet, first NOS to do so, for E-Line, ELAN, & E-Tree.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, IP Infusion, a renowned open networking solutions provider, revealed that their cutting-edge network operating system, OcNOS®, has successfully obtained MEF 3.0 Carrier Ethernet certification for E-Line, ELAN, and E-Tree services. This certification signifies the company's adherence to the stringent criteria set by MEF, the leading organization in the industry. OcNOS has made history as the initial Open Networking NOS to achieve MEF certification, underscoring its capacity to offer smooth, standards-compliant solutions.

news.headline: River City Medical Group becomes Vivant Health, serving 270,000 California patients. Rebrand signifies new era in healthcare.
news.summary: A healthcare company based in Sacramento, California, River City Medical Group, Inc. (RCMG) recently underwent a significant change by rebranding eight of its healthcare entities as "Vivant Health." This move signifies a new beginning in the healthcare industry and demonstrates the company's commitment to revitalizing its services. The rebranding includes various programs and services under the Vivant Health umbrella, marking a strategic shift towards a more cohesive and modern approach. This transformation, unveiled on October 22, 2024, is set to impact a substantial number of patients and healthcare professionals, with the newly named Vivant Health aiming to provide improved and streamlined care to a wide demographic.

news.headline: Indiana Joint Replacement Institute and HOPCo collaborate to enhance orthopedic care in Noblelsville. Oct 22, 2024.
news.summary: A recent partnership between IJRI and HOPCO in Phoenix and Noblesville, Indiana, announced on October 22, 2024, is set to combine IJRI's established clinical platform with HOPCO's Complete Network Solutions (CNS). This collaboration aims to establish a technology-enhanced destination center for orthopedic excellence. The venture is expected to bring together quality healthcare services and cutting-edge technology, offering patients a unique and comprehensive healthcare experience in the orthopedic field.

news.headline: Untappd for Business uses AI to enhance digital menus for bars & restaurants; revolutionizing customization.
news.summary: Cutting-edge AI technology is transforming the digital menu customization experience for bars, restaurants, breweries, and retail businesses in Charlotte, North Carolina. On October 22, 2024, Next Glass and Untappd for Business announced this revolutionary enhancement, establishing them as the premier menu publishing platform worldwide for these industries. This advancement promises unparalleled levels of customization and efficiency, revolutionizing how businesses showcase their offerings to patrons.

news.headline: Monark Markets secures $2.2M in seed funding, total funding now $3.6M; approved as Broker-Dealer.
news.summary: Monark has recently been granted regulatory approval to function as a broker-dealer. The fintech startup has successfully secured $2.2 million in funding, which has increased its total funding to $3.6 million. Established in New York, Monark specializes in integrating private market investments and trading solutions into conventional brokerage and wealth platforms.

news.headline: Almanac & WiseConn partner to enhance smart irrigation for farmers globally. AI tech boosts efficiency, reduces labor.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Fresno, California, farmers are adopting advanced technology to make irrigation more efficient and less labor-intensive. Smart irrigation systems use data-driven operations to optimize water usage compared to traditional methods. This helps in better controlling irrigation despite uncontrollable weather conditions. The systems are transforming farming practices to increase productivity and sustainability in agriculture.

news.headline: Access exclusive luxury travel experiences on Maui through Global Travel Collection for VIP clients from GTC advisors.
news.summary: New episodes of the travel competition series "1st Look Presents: Extra Mile Club" are now offering exclusive experiences to clients of GTC travel advisors. The luxurious travel opportunities showcased in the series are available only to those who book through GTC advisors. This announcement was made on October 22, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: Riverside Luxury Cruises offers 300-Euro onboard credit for 2025 voyages, along with up to 35% savings.
news.summary: In Denver on October 22, 2024, Riverside Luxury Cruises introduced a special fall offer that provides travelers with up to 35% in savings. This offer includes a generous 300-Euro onboard credit for guests, adding to the luxurious experience of their river cruise. The promotion aims to celebrate the spirit of giving during this season, allowing travelers to indulge in unparalleled luxury while enjoying the scenic views along the river.

news.headline: WitnessAI releases secure enablement platform for AI, offering visibility, control, and protection of Gen AI activity. Commercially available as of Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: WitnessAI, a company based in Belmont, California, has officially launched its platform for ensuring visibility, control, and protection of Generation AI (Gen AI) activity. The platform is the first of its kind and aims to enable safe usage of AI technology. This announcement was made on October 22, 2024. Interested individuals or businesses can now access the platform directly.
